programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps renovate a living room for a mother with a heart condition.

programme.title: Home Away from Home
programme.desc: A trio from Suffolk swap houses with a couple from West Sussex.

programme.title: Home Away from Home
programme.desc: Couples from South Yorkshire and Devon put lifestyles under the microscope.

programme.title: Home Away from Home
programme.desc: BBC Home & Garden provides home renovation shows, interior design makeovers, and garden transformation programming. It features British lifestyle content focused on property upgrades, DIY projects, and creative home improvement ideas.
